title: taraxacum clovense
intro: Taraxacum clovense, also known as the cloven dandelion, is a species of flowering plant within the dandelion genus. It is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional European folk medicine, where it has been used to treat various ailments due to its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Taraxacum clovense include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve liver function, and support immune system health. Herbal preparations of Taraxacum clovense can be found in the form of teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to treat digestive issues and other health concerns.
